value.rationale: The user intends to plan a new BirdCode slice focused on connecting the model-driven planner/replanner core to a daemon. The goal involves the root agent creating typed plans, delegating two parallel read-only repository audits with separate contexts, and collecting structured handoffs without using language-specific shortcuts. It also requires preserving causal history for post-compaction continuity and maintaining Japanese semantic constraints. I must first explore the repository to locate existing planner/daemon components and understand the current architecture.

work_orders.objective: Identify the existing planner/replanner core and daemon components to understand current integration points.

proposed_verification_targets.question: Explore the repository root to locate planner, replanner, and daemon-related directories or files.

work_orders.objective: Examine the current implementation of the planner and daemon to identify how they interact or where the connection needs to be established.

proposed_verification_targets.question: Search for 'planner' and 'daemon' to identify relevant implementation files.
